subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-26
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, this is a very good gathering! Blessed souls are present... What is the meaning of the image and likeness of God?
subcodes.subjects: @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity; oneness of humanity, @human reality created in the image of God, @spiritual transformation, @oneness; unity of religion
